title: useMounted hook for SSR-safe conditional rendering
scenario_context: Some content shouldn't SSR (e.g., uses browser APIs). useMounted returns false on server, true after mount.
responsive_reasoning: 1. useMounted prevents hydration mismatch.\n2. Client-only sections.\n3. SSR-safe.

title: Cookie consent banner with adaptive layout per container width
scenario_context: Cookie banner. Wide: text + buttons inline. Narrow: stacked.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-258 NotificationCard.\n2. Adaptive arrangement.\n3. Same content.
solution: // See responsive-353 CookieBanner pattern.

title: Code documentation with inline code that breaks gracefully
scenario_context: Inline code in paragraphs. On narrow viewport, code shouldn't overflow. Wrap or scroll.
responsive_reasoning: 1. overflow-wrap: anywhere for inline code.\n2. Wraps without breaking syntax visually.\n3. Per responsive-289.

title: Grid layout that maintains row alignment with subgrid

responsive_reasoning: 1. Subgrid.\n2. Native alignment.\n3. Per responsive-228.

title: Tap-anywhere-to-blur input for clean exit on mobile
scenario_context: User taps outside input — input blurs, keyboard dismisses. Native iOS pattern.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Tap outside input blurs.\n2. Keyboard dismisses.\n3. Native iOS behavior.

title: Settings page with header sticky and content respecting safe area
scenario_context: Settings page header sticky with safe area. Content below scrolls.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Header sticky + env top.\n2. Content padded below.\n3. Per responsive-113.
solution: // See responsive-113 StackedStickyLayout.

title: Slideshow that adapts aspect ratio to viewport
scenario_context: Hero slideshow. Portrait phone: tall aspect. Landscape: wide.
responsive_reasoning: 1. aspect-ratio per orientation.\n2. Focal point preserved (responsive-209).\n3. Universal.

title: iPad-optimized drag preview customization
scenario_context: Drag preview on iPad. Native gives a ghost image. Custom larger preview helps visibility.
responsive_reasoning: 1. DataTransfer.setDragImage with custom.\n2. Touch drag uses native preview.\n3. Per responsive-020.
solution: // On drag start:\n// onDragStart={(e) => { const img = ...; e.dataTransfer.setDragImage(img, 0, 0); }}\n// Production: use dnd-kit which handles this well.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Custom preview. 2) Universal drag UX. 3) Library-supported.

title: Sidebar resize with drag and persisted state per breakpoint
scenario_context: Per responsive-010 + per-breakpoint persistence.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-010.\n2. Per-breakpoint storage.\n3. Universal.
solution: // See responsive-010 PaneLayout.

scenario_context: Per responsive-131 TreeTable. Tree structure tables.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-131.\n2. Container-aware indent.\n3. Native tree pattern.

title: Confirmation step within wizard that doesn't lose state

responsive_reasoning: 1. Modal preserves wizard state.\n2. Adaptive dialog.\n3. Per responsive-285.

title: Multi-monitor support: window position aware of screen
scenario_context: Window opens on secondary monitor. Use Window.screen API to position popups correctly.
responsive_reasoning: 1. screen.availLeft/Top.\n2. Position relative.\n3. Avoid off-screen.
accessibility_across_viewports: Don't open popups without user action.

title: Detect WebView vs full browser for adjusted UI

responsive_reasoning: 1. UA detection acceptable here.\n2. Banner to open in browser.\n3. Per responsive-106.

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Tap banner to open in browser
